title: Memories from a Train Window
content: As the train crossed the countryside, Sophia rested her head against the window and watched landscapes drift past. Villages appeared briefly before disappearing behind hills. Rivers reflected the afternoon sunlight, and distant farms stretched toward the horizon. The movement of the train created a rhythm that encouraged reflection. Sophia found herself thinking about previous journeys, old friendships, and decisions that had shaped her life. Travel often created space for such thoughts. Removed from daily responsibilities, she could observe both the world outside and the memories within her own mind. By the time the train reached its destination, the journey had become as much an emotional experience as a physical one.
